aspects.description: Users would comment on the variety and flexibility of pacing modes available for different clinical needs.
Users would discuss how long the device operates on battery power during typical use.
Users would mention the weight, size, and ease of handling the device in clinical settings.
Users would evaluate the ability to adjust pacing output amplitude to suit patient requirements.
Users would comment on how well the device senses intrinsic heart rhythms and avoids oversensing.
Users would review the device’s built-in safety mechanisms to prevent pacing errors or complications.
Users would discuss the range of pacing rates supported, including rapid atrial pacing capabilities.
